landing.heroTagline: Free trading journal for individual investors
landing.heroDesc: Spend just 30 seconds on your trade journal. AI analyzes your patterns and coaches you to avoid repeating the same mistakes.
landing.painPoint1: Can't remember why you made that trading decision
landing.painPoint2: Gave up recording in spreadsheets — too tedious to maintain
landing.painPoint3: Don't know your exact win rate and returns
landing.painPoint4: Keep repeating the same mistakes but can't find the cause
landing.solutionDesc: StockJournal lets you complete a trade record in just 30 seconds. View your flow through calendars and charts, and discover your own patterns by stock. The more records you build, the clearer your investment decisions become.
landing.strengthDesc: You maintain consistent stop-loss criteria in Samsung Electronics short-term trades. Your planned trading stands out with an average holding period of 2.3 days.
landing.improvementDesc: A pattern of late profit-taking is repeating in NVDA positions. Consider partial selling when target price is reached.
landing.weeklySummaryDesc: 8 total trades · 62.5% win rate · Realized P&L +127,400 KRW
landing.aiCoachDesc: Google Gemini AI analyzes your trading data to identify strengths and weaknesses. It catches patterns that are hard to discover on your own.
landing.aiFeature1Desc: Comprehensive analysis of weekly trades with improvement suggestions
landing.aiFeature2Desc: Entry/exit timing and strategy feedback for individual trades
landing.aiFeature3Desc: Access AI analysis features with free coins
landing.benefit1Desc: Just enter date, stock, price, and quantity. Add context with notes and tags.
landing.benefit2Desc: AI analyzes trading patterns and coaches improvements. Weekly reports and per-trade reviews.
landing.benefit3Desc: One click on a stock to instantly view candlestick charts and realized/unrealized P&L.
landing.benefit4Desc: Supabase-based real-time sync. Access anywhere, no data loss.
landing.benefit5Desc: Start instantly without signing up. Link your account when ready to keep your data.
landing.benefit6Desc: Calendar view and stock-based grouping to spot trading flows and repeated mistakes at a glance.
landing.testimonial1Text: I gave up recording in Excel, but I've been logging daily with StockJournal for 3 months. After discovering patterns, my win rate improved noticeably.
landing.testimonial2Text: I spend 30 seconds before work organizing the previous day's trades. When I analyze at month-end, I can immediately see which stocks I'm weak in.
landing.testimonial3Text: Having charts and trade records on one screen makes review so much easier. I started as a guest and now use cloud sync.
landing.faq1A: Yes, it's completely free. You can use guest mode without an account, and cloud sync is available after signing up.
landing.faq2A: Data is encrypted and stored in Supabase (PostgreSQL-based) cloud. We support Google OAuth login so you can use it securely without a separate password.
landing.faq3Q: What's the difference between guest mode and account login?
landing.faq3A: Guest mode only saves to your browser (localStorage), so data won't persist when switching devices. Linking an account syncs to the cloud for access anywhere.
landing.faq4Q: Can I record both US and Korean stocks?
landing.faq4A: Yes, you can record any stock by ticker symbol. KOSPI/KOSDAQ/US stocks are all supported, and USD→KRW exchange rate conversion is also available.
landing.faq5A: Google Gemini AI analyzes your trading data. Weekly reports summarize your trading patterns and improvements, and per-trade reviews provide feedback on individual trades. You can use it with coins.
landing.ctaDesc: You don't grow without recording. 30 seconds is all you need.

insights.bestWeekdayDesc: Trades entered on {label} have the highest win rate at {winRate}% ({count} trades).
insights.worstWeekdayDesc: Trades entered on {label} have the lowest win rate at {winRate}%. Consider reducing trades on this day.
insights.bestHoldingDesc: {label} trades have the highest avg return at {avgReturn}% ({count} trades).
insights.fomoLossDesc: FOMO trades have a {winRate}% win rate. Prioritize planned trades.
insights.plannedEffectiveDesc: Planned trades have the highest win rate at {winRate}%.
insights.bestStrategyDesc: This strategy has the highest win rate at {winRate}% ({count} trades, avg return {avgReturn}%).
insights.concentrationRiskDesc: {percentage}% of your portfolio is concentrated in {symbol}. Consider diversifying.
insights.lossStreakDesc: You are on a {count}-trade losing streak. Consider reducing position size or pausing trading.
insights.winStreakDesc: Great momentum! But stay disciplined and maintain your risk management.
insights.winRateGoodDesc: Your current trading style is working well. Stay consistent.
insights.winRateBadDesc: Review your entry timing and stock selection. Setting clear stop-loss levels can help.
insights.profitFactorGoodDesc: Your gains are {pf}x your losses, indicating a solid profit structure.
insights.profitFactorBadDesc: Your losses exceed your gains. Consider tightening your stop-loss levels.
insights.gatheringDataDesc: You have {count} completed trades so far. More trade data will reveal meaningful patterns.

rr.goodRatio: Good ratio. Professional traders recommend at least 1:2 or higher.
rr.moderateRatio: Moderate level. Try adjusting your target to achieve 1:2 or higher.
rr.dangerousRatio: Dangerous ratio. Loss potential exceeds profit potential.

ps.tip: Risk Management Tip: Professional traders risk only 1-2% of their account per position. Even 10 consecutive stop losses preserve 80-90% of your account.

ad.requiredRise: Required rise from current price to target average

rr.metaDesc: Enter entry price, stop-loss, and target to calculate risk-reward ratio and recommended position size.

import.title: Import Trades
import.dragDropPrompt: Drag and drop a CSV file or click to browse
import.csvOnly: Only CSV or TXT files can be uploaded.
import.fileProcessError: An error occurred while processing the file.
import.kiwoomStep2: Enter screen number 0343 in the top bar and press Enter
import.kiwoomStep3: Select account → Set date range → Click [Search]
import.kiwoomStep5: Click [Save as Excel(S)] → Save as CSV or xlsx

import.miraeStep1: Launch KAIROS HTS and log in
import.miraeStep2: Enter screen number 0650 in the input field and press Enter
import.miraeStep3: Set date range → Transaction type: Trade → Click [Search]
import.miraeStep5: Click [Save as Excel file] → Choose save location
import.nhStep5: Click the [Excel Download] button at the bottom
import.nhTip: The web interface is more convenient for file downloads than HTS
import.samsungStep1: Launch POP HTS and log in
import.samsungStep3: Set date range → Transaction type: Executed → Click [Search]
import.samsungStep5: Click [Save as Excel] → Save as CSV
import.samsungTip: Navigate to Account → Order History to view executed trades
import.hankookStep1: Launch eFriend Expert and log in
import.hankookStep2: Enter screen number 8011 in the input field and press Enter
import.hankookStep3: Set date range → Trade type: All → Click [Search]
import.hankookStep5: Click [Save as Excel] → Save as CSV

checklist.plannedDesc: Confirm that this trade meets the entry criteria you analyzed and set in advance.
checklist.stopLossDesc: Define your maximum acceptable loss before entry and set a clear stop-loss level.
checklist.positionSizeDesc: It's recommended to concentrate no more than 10% of your total capital in a single stock.
checklist.notEmotional: Is this not an emotional trade?

checklist.exitPlan: Do you have an exit plan?
checklist.exitPlanDesc: Have both a target price and stop-loss price — two scenarios prepared in advance.

warnings.overtradingCriticalDesc: You've made {count} trades in the last 3 days. Frequent trading leads to commission losses and emotional decision-making.
warnings.overtradingWarningDesc: {count} trades have been made in the last 3 days. Reduce trading frequency and only enter on clear opportunities.
warnings.revengeDesc: You're trying to buy with a larger amount than usual. Check if you're trading to recover from consecutive losses.
warnings.concentrationDesc: You've already bought {symbol} {count} times. Consider diversifying before adding more.
warnings.lossStreakDesc: There have been several recent sells. Check your win/loss flow in the analysis tab before buying.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Title: 1. Purpose of Collecting and Using Personal Information
privacy.section1Intro: Ojeonggu (hereinafter "Company") collects and uses personal information for the following purposes.
privacy.section1Item1: Member registration and management: Member identification, service provision
privacy.section1Item2: Service provision: Trade record storage, AI analysis report generation
privacy.section1Item3: Payment processing: Coin purchase and payment history management
privacy.section1Item4: Service improvement: Usage statistics analysis, service quality improvement
privacy.section2Item1: Required: Email address (provided via social login)
privacy.section2Item2: Automatically collected: Service usage records, access logs
privacy.section2Item3: During payment: Payment method information (processed through PG service; the Company does not directly store card numbers, etc.)
privacy.section3Title: 3. Retention and Usage Period of Personal Information
privacy.section3Content: Personal information is retained until membership withdrawal and destroyed immediately upon withdrawal. However, if retention is required by relevant laws, it is stored for the applicable period.
privacy.section3Item1: Act on the Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce: Records of contracts or subscription withdrawal for 5 years, records of payment and supply of goods for 5 years
privacy.section3Item2: Protection of Communications Secrets Act: Access log records for 3 months
privacy.section4Title: 4. Provision of Personal Information to Third Parties
privacy.section4Content: The Company does not, in principle, provide users' personal information to external parties. However, exceptions are made when the user has consented or when required by law.
privacy.section5Content: When the retention period has elapsed or the processing purpose has been achieved, the relevant personal information is destroyed without delay. Information in electronic file format is deleted using methods that make recovery impossible.
privacy.section6Content: Users may request access, correction, deletion, or suspension of processing of their personal information at any time. Please contact us using the information below.

terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.article1Content: These terms and conditions aim to define the usage conditions, procedures, and the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between the Company and users regarding the StockJournal service provided by Ojeonggu (hereinafter "Company").
terms.article2Item1: "Service" refers to the stock trade journal recording and analysis web service provided by the Company.
terms.article2Item2: "User" refers to a person who uses the service in accordance with these terms.
terms.article2Item3: "Coin" refers to digital goods purchased to use paid features such as AI analysis within the service.
terms.article3Item1: These terms become effective when posted on the service screen or otherwise notified to users.
terms.article3Item2: The Company may change the terms within the scope that does not violate relevant laws when reasonable grounds arise.
terms.article4Item1: Stock trade record creation, viewing, editing, and deletion
terms.article5Item1: Users must comply with relevant laws and these terms when using the service.
terms.article5Item2: Users must not steal others' information or use the service fraudulently.
terms.article5Item3: Users are responsible for the accuracy of trade records they enter.
terms.article6Item1: Information provided by the service is not investment advice, and investment decisions are the user's responsibility.
terms.article6Item2: AI analysis results are reference materials, and the Company is not liable for investment losses based on them.
terms.article6Item3: The Company is not liable for service interruptions caused by force majeure such as natural disasters or system failures.
terms.article7Item1: Coins can be purchased at prices set by the Company.
terms.article7Item2: Purchased coins are used for paid features within the service.
terms.article7Item3: Coin refunds are subject to the refund policy.
terms.article8Content: If a dispute arises regarding the use of the service, the Company and the user shall resolve it through mutual consultation. If consultation fails, either party may file a lawsuit with the competent court.

refund.heading: Coin Information
refund.section1Content: StockJournal coins are automatically credited with 10 coins daily at midnight. Coins do not accumulate and the balance is refreshed to 10 coins every day.
refund.section2Content: Coins are currently provided for free. Separate purchase or refund is not supported.
